more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Dr Edson Zvobgo: Architect of power, victim of politics in Zimbabwe
more.description: ​History is often unkind to those who build the very prisons they later wish to escape. Whenever the story of Zimbabwe’s liberation struggle is told, few figures loom as large, as complex, or as ultimately frustrated as Dr Edson Jonas Mudadirwa Zvobgo. The post Dr Edson Zvobgo: Architect of power, victim of politics in Zimbabwe appeared first on Nehanda Radio .

more.title: One person requires US$50,46 for total monthly expenses – Zimsat
more.description: A single person now requires the equivalent of US$50.46 per month to meet basic expenses, according to the latest data from the Zimbabwe National Statistics Agency (ZimStat). more.description: Saisada Kafuni’s 86th-minute own goal handed Zimbabwe a 1-0 victory over Zambia, securing the Four Nations Tournament trophy in a final played at Obed Itani Chilume Stadium in Francistown, Botswana. more.title: South Africa and Zambia Move to Shield Economies from Global Fuel Price Shock
more.description: JOHANNESBURG / LUSAKA — Governments in South Africa and Zambia have rolled out emergency policy measures to cushion consumers and stabilise their economies as global oil prices surge following escalating tensions involving Iran, Israel and the United States.
